executive_summary_zh: 今天候选内容里只有一篇足够有技术含量的文章，主题聚焦在 agentic coding eval 的基础设施噪声，这对解读 SWE-bench、Terminal-Bench 一类榜单非常关键。
Anthropic 给出的核心结论是：运行时资源配置与执行约束本身就会显著改变评测结果，分差甚至可能大于模型榜单上的领先差距。
对工程负责人而言，这意味着在采购、选型、上线和内部横评中，必须把“评测环境治理”视为与模型能力同等重要的一层系统设计。
executive_summary_en: Only one candidate is strong enough today, but it is highly relevant: infrastructure noise in agentic coding evaluations.
Anthropic’s main finding is that runtime configuration and enforcement can shift benchmark scores by more than the gap separating top models on coding leaderboards.
For engineering leaders, this means model evaluation, vendor comparison, and internal bake-offs need environment governance and harness discipline, not just prompt/model tuning.

items.title: Quantifying infrastructure noise in agentic coding evals
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 讨论了 agentic coding benchmark 中常被忽略的一层变量：基础设施配置本身。文章指出，在 Terminal-Bench 2.0 的内部实验中，不同资源配置与执行方式可造成约 6 个百分点的成绩差异，已经超过许多前沿模型在榜单上的分差。由于这类评测要求模型在真实运行环境中写代码、跑测试、安装依赖并多轮迭代，运行时不再是被动容器，而是评测的一部分，因此 CPU、RAM、时限和资源 enforcement 方式都会改变“被测的到底是什么”。
items.summary_en: Anthropic examines a frequently overlooked variable in agentic coding benchmarks: infrastructure configuration. In internal Terminal-Bench 2.0 experiments, different resource setups and enforcement methods produced roughly a 6-point score swing, larger than the margin between many frontier models on public leaderboards. Because these evaluations let models write code, run tests, install dependencies, and iterate in a live environment, the runtime is part of the task itself rather than a neutral container; CPU, RAM, time limits, and enforcement mechanics materially change what is being measured.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇文章直接挑战了团队对 coding benchmark 分数的默认解读方式。对于在做模型选型、代理框架对比、CI 中自动评测或内部 coding agent 竞标的团队来说，如果没有统一且可复现的 harness、资源预算和失败归因机制，那么结论可能反映的是“谁更吃资源、谁更适应某种容器策略”，而不是谁真正更擅长软件工程任务。
items.why_it_matters_en: This piece challenges the default assumption that coding benchmark scores are clean measurements of model quality. For teams comparing models, agents, or internal stacks, any conclusion without a standardized harness, resource budget, and failure attribution policy may mostly reflect who benefits from a particular environment rather than who is genuinely better at software engineering tasks.
key_takeaways_zh: Agentic coding eval 与静态 benchmark 不同，运行环境是任务的一部分，因此 infra 不是背景变量，而是核心实验条件。
资源预算与 enforcement 方法会显著影响得分；若不统一，模型之间的细微分差缺乏可比性。
评测设计应明确 CPU、RAM、超时、重试、容器隔离和 infra error 归因，否则 leaderboard 容易误导采购与部署决策。
key_takeaways_en: Unlike static benchmarks, agentic coding evals make the runtime environment part of the task, so infra is a first-class experimental variable.
Resource budgets and enforcement methodology can materially shift scores; without standardization, small model deltas are not trustworthy.
Eval design should specify CPU, RAM, timeout, retry policy, container isolation, and infra error attribution, or leaderboard-driven decisions may be misleading.

top_items: Quantifying infrastructure noise in agentic coding evals
themes_zh: AI coding 评测正在从“模型打分”转向“模型+运行环境+执行策略”的系统评测。
榜单可比性的瓶颈开始从 prompt 与模型本身，转移到 harness 标准化与资源治理。
工程组织需要把 eval 平台当成生产级基础设施来建设。
themes_en: AI coding evaluation is shifting from pure model scoring to system-level measurement of model plus runtime plus execution policy.
Benchmark comparability is increasingly constrained by harness standardization and resource governance, not just prompts and models.
Engineering organizations should treat eval platforms as production-grade infrastructure.
implications_zh: 如果你在做内部 coding-agent bake-off，应冻结容器镜像、CPU/RAM 配额、timeout 与重试规则，并单独统计 infra failure。
如果你依赖外部 leaderboard 做模型采购，应该追问运行环境与执行约束，否则分数差异可能不可操作。
如果你在设计自家 benchmark，应把资源规格和 enforcement 机制写入协议，并提供可复现实验脚本。
implications_en: If you run internal coding-agent bake-offs, freeze container images, CPU/RAM quotas, timeout and retry rules, and separately track infra failures.
If you rely on public leaderboards for model selection, ask for runtime and enforcement details because score differences may not be operationally meaningful.
If you design your own benchmark, make resource specs and enforcement mechanics part of the protocol and provide reproducible harness scripts.
reading_order: Quantifying infrastructure noise in agentic coding evals
what_to_ignore_zh: 不要把 coding leaderboard 上 1-3 个百分点的差距直接解读为模型能力领先。
不要忽视 benchmark 运行环境细节；在 agentic eval 里它不是实现细节，而是实验变量。
what_to_ignore_en: Do not interpret 1-3 point coding leaderboard gaps as clean evidence of superior model capability.
Do not treat runtime environment details as implementation trivia; in agentic evals they are part of the experiment.
